---
title: I am ...
---
- mentally unsound
- self aware
- anxious
- paradoxical 
- cat person
- shut-in
- christian
- chronically online
- attention seeker
- introvert
- emotionally inept
- socially awkward
- unable to see well without my glasses
- over obsessive
- underweight
- bad at conversations
- lazy
- understanding
- swing the other way
- smart and stupid
- hopeless romantic (I'm way too invested in love)

    ul {
        border-radius: 10px;

    list-style-type: none;
    margin-bottom: 10px;

        content: "";
